summary: Closing-paragraph 3.6× ambiguity is fixed by EXP-278 patch A. The integrated text replaced 'sits approximately 10.8 nT above the ±3 nT ceiling (i.e., roughly 3.6× the threshold: 10.9 / 3 ≈ 3.6)' with 'is roughly 3.6× the rule's ±3 nT half-width (|−10.9| / 3 ≈ 3.6)'. The replacement names the metric explicitly, drops the spurious 10.8-nT figure (|−10.9| − 3 = 7.9, not 10.8), and uses the curmudgeon-recommended phrasing. Quantitative claim (3.6×) is unchanged. Apply EXP-278 then close ISS-1690.
